batch_objective: B-02 (P1, baseline backlog 2026-07-09): patch-editor check results explain themselves. (1) OPERATOR-DECIDED behavior change (round-3, 2026-07-09): drop the collective has_errors taint -- only entries carrying an attributable error become uncheckable (each with reason_code + display reason); healthy entries still checked; wrong document kind stays a whole-run block with ONE loud run-level reason; genuinely document-global faults still block with a reason.
